core.description: Essential framework files. Required in all profiles.

lessons-engine.description: Lessons learned engine with improvement cycle.

gate-keeper.description: HMAC-SHA256 approval system with phase transitions and discipline checks.

ci-runtime.description: GitHub Actions CI pipeline and pre-commit hooks.

growth-engine.description: Native growth tools: skill creation and agent creation.

hooks-runtime.description: Agent hooks system and hook schemas.

hooks-strict.description: Strict blocking hooks for governance, secrets and protected branches.

lifecycle-agents.description: Ephemeral agent lifecycle: create, invoke, retire, recall.

evolve-skills.description: Auto-generate skills from instinct patterns and community sync.

researcher.description: Autonomous research for skills, methodologies and frameworks.

eval-harness.description: Eval framework with 4 grader types and per-skill suites.

security-suite.description: Security audit, secret scan, supply chain and anti-MCP enforcement.

observability.description: Spans, cost tracking and session replay via NDJSON traces.

platform-configs.description: IDE adapter configurations: claude-code, opencode, cursor, windsurf, vscode-copilot, antigravity, codex.

global-wrapper.description: Global wrapper integration for lean installations.

gitflow-sprint.description: GitFlow automatizado por sprint: setup dev/collab, sprint-start/close, pre-push, status.

discipline-check.description: Valida CONTENIDO de artefactos por disciplina: SDD/FDD/DDD/BDD/TDD/STDD/SecDD. Activar con EVOL_DISCIPLINE=1.

sprint-workflows.description: Workflows de ciclo de sprint: /evol historias (4 artefactos por historia) y /evol sprint (ciclo completo con equipos dinamicos).

diagnostics.description: Environment diagnostic with JSON output and exit codes.

provider.description: LLM provider abstraction: MockProvider (deterministic) and AnthropicProvider (lazy).

state-store.description: SQLite state store for continuous learning instincts.

flow-gate.description: Declarative flow gate executor: runs flows as ExecutionTrace, validates execution.

branding.description: Apply custom branding and white-labeling to the framework.

community-skills.description: Skills de comunidad portadas nativas (atribucion en NOTICE): grill-me, fact-check, idea-refine, prompt-master.

mcp-manager.description: Gestor de servidores MCP (Model Context Protocol).
